summary: Iteration 4 - Full testing of new engines: Event Response Engine (5-stage state machine), Execution Gate (priority-based decision layer), Strategy Monitor (loss streak detection, graduated recovery), and Features API. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully functional with all three new panels rendering correctly with Chinese Mandarin UI.
passed_tests: GET /api/health - returns healthy status
GET /api/prices/AUD_USD - returns valid price data with indicators
GET /api/prices/NZD_USD - returns valid price data
GET /api/signals/current - returns signals for both pairs
GET /api/events - returns economic calendar events
GET /api/risk/status - returns risk control status
GET /api/event-response/status - returns engines for AUD/USD and NZD/USD with pair_config
POST /api/event-response/reset - resets engines back to IDLE
POST /api/event-response/trigger - triggers event detection state for both pairs
Event Response pair_config shows max_wait_seconds=90 for both FX pairs
GET /api/execution-gate/status - returns gate_state, pair_risk_config, regime_multipliers
POST /api/execution-gate/evaluate?pair=AUD/USD - returns GateDecision with action, priority_level
POST /api/execution-gate/evaluate?pair=NZD/USD - returns GateDecision
Execution Gate AUD/USD base_risk=0.3%, multiplier=0.7x verified
Execution Gate NZD/USD base_risk=0.25%, multiplier=0.6x verified
Execution Gate blocks during event with EVENT_ reason code
GET /api/strategy-monitor/health - returns health for both pairs with GREEN state
POST /api/strategy-monitor/record-trade - records trades and updates consecutive losses
Strategy Monitor: After 6 consecutive losses on AUD/USD, pair is frozen
POST /api/strategy-monitor/unfreeze - unfreezes a frozen pair
GET /api/features/AUD_USD - returns vol_ratio, spread_ratio, trend_score_5m
GET /api/features/NZD_USD - returns features
Frontend: Event Response Panel renders with data-testid='event-response-panel'
Frontend: Execution Gate Panel renders with data-testid='execution-gate-panel'
Frontend: Strategy Monitor Panel renders with data-testid='strategy-monitor-panel'
Frontend: Trigger event button works and updates state display
Frontend: Evaluate gate buttons for AUD/USD and NZD/USD work
Frontend: Chinese Mandarin UI displays correctly (事件响应, 执行闸门, 策略监控, etc.)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three new engines are fully working: EventResponseEngine (5-stage state machine with max_wait=90s per pair), ExecutionGate (priority P0-P6 decision layer with pair-specific risk config), StrategyMonitor (loss streak detection with 6-loss freeze threshold for AUD/USD, graduated recovery 30->50->75->100%). Features API returns vol_ratio, spread_ratio, trend_score_5m. Previous features (Telegram, MongoDB, prices, signals, events, risk control) continue to work. Market price data is SIMULATED.

mocked_apis_list: Market price data (simulated - no real Twelve Data API key)

features: 5-stage state machine: IDLE → EVENT_DETECTED → IMPULSE_PHASE → LIQUIDITY_REBUILD → DIRECTION_CONFIRM → READY/INVALID
Regime multipliers: NORMAL=1.0, TREND=1.0, RANGE=0.8, EVENT=0.6, UNSTABLE=0.0
Blocks trading during active events with EVENT_ reason codes
Loss streak detection (AUD/USD: freeze at 6 losses, NZD/USD: freeze at 5)
Graduated recovery: COOLDOWN → RECOVERY_30 → RECOVERY_50 → RECOVERY_75 → GREEN
